keyPoints: TCP has a maximum segment size (MSS) of 24 bits, and an option to pad to 32 bits (24.3.6)
TCP is guaranteed to deliver all data, even if packets are lost (24.3.7)
TCP can handle up to 64 concurrent connections (24.3.8)
TCP is a connection-oriented protocol, requiring a three-way handshake to establish a connection (24.3.9)
